allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\proyectos\\minio-elt\\webapp"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "uvicorn" -ArgumentList "main:app --port 8000 --reload" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Dashboard: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/dim_aerolinea" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "dim_aerolinea: $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/dim_ruta" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "dim_ruta: $\($r3.StatusCode\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($tablas = @\("dim_aerolinea","dim_aeropuerto","dim_avion","fact_vuelo","dim_tiempo","dim_ruta"\); foreach \($t in $tablas\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/$t" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "$t : $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$t : ERROR - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TOKEN:', d.get\('token','ERROR'\)[:40]+'...' if d.get\('token'\) else d\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('token','NO TOKEN'\)[:50] if d.get\('token'\) else d\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; cols=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  - {c['name']} \(type={c['type']}, fields={len\(c.get\('fields',[]\)\)}\\"\) for c in cols.get\('items',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {r.get\('clave','?'\)} = {r.get\('valor','?'\)}\\"\) for r in d.get\('items',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r\) for r in d.get\('items',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK - DAGs:', [x['dag_id'] for x in d.get\('dags',[]\)]\)")
